questions.question: KNN is called a 'lazy learner.' What does that mean?
questions.questionZh: K近邻算法（KNN）被称为“惰性学习器（lazy learner）”。这是什么意思？
options: It converges slowly during training
It does no computation at training time and computes everything at prediction time
It uses a simplified version of the loss function
It only works on small datasets
optionsZh: 它在训练 (training) 过程中收敛 (convergence) 缓慢。
它在训练阶段 (training time) 不执行任何计算，而是在预测阶段 (prediction time) 完成所有计算。
它使用了损失函数（loss function）的简化版本。
它仅适用于小型数据集 (small datasets)。
questions.explanation: Lazy learning means KNN stores the training data and does no work during 'training.' All computation (distance calculations, voting) happens when a prediction is requested.
questions.explanationZh: 惰性学习（Lazy Learning）是指 K近邻（K-Nearest Neighbors, KNN）算法仅存储训练数据，在“训练”阶段不执行任何工作。所有计算（如距离计算、投票）均在请求预测时进行。

questions.question: Why is feature scaling critical for KNN?
questions.questionZh: 为什么特征缩放（Feature Scaling）对K近邻算法（KNN）至关重要？
options: KNN cannot handle negative numbers without scaling
Distance calculations are dominated by features with larger ranges, making scaling necessary for fair comparisons
Feature scaling reduces the number of neighbors needed
KNN uses gradient descent which requires normalized inputs
optionsZh: 在不进行特征缩放（Feature Scaling）的情况下，K近邻算法（KNN）无法处理负数。
距离计算（Distance Calculation）往往受取值范围较大的特征（Feature）主导，因此必须进行特征缩放（Feature Scaling），以确保比较的公平性。
特征缩放（Feature Scaling）可减少所需的近邻数量。
K近邻算法（K-Nearest Neighbors）使用梯度下降（Gradient Descent），该方法要求输入数据经过归一化（Normalization）处理。
questions.explanation: KNN relies on distances. A feature ranging 0-1000 will dominate a feature ranging 0-1 in distance calculations. Scaling puts all features on comparable ranges.
questions.explanationZh: K近邻算法（K-Nearest Neighbors）依赖于距离度量。在距离计算中，取值范围为 0-1000 的特征会主导取值范围为 0-1 的特征。特征缩放（Feature Scaling）能将所有特征调整至可比较的量级范围。

questions.question: In 100 dimensions with uniform random points, what happens to the ratio of max distance to min distance?
questions.questionZh: 在 100 维 (100 dimensions) 空间中，若使用均匀随机点 (uniform random points)，最大距离与最小距离的比值 (ratio of max distance to min distance) 会发生怎样的变化？
options: It increases dramatically, making neighbors more distinct
It approaches 1, making all points nearly equidistant from each other
It stays the same as in 2 dimensions
It becomes negative due to numerical overflow
optionsZh: 其值急剧增大，使得近邻 (neighbors) 之间的区分度更加显著。
它趋近于 1，使得所有点彼此之间几乎等距 (equidistant)。
它与二维（2 dimensions）情况保持一致。
由于数值溢出（numerical overflow），该值变为负数。
questions.explanation: This is the curse of dimensionality. In high dimensions, distances converge: max_dist / min_dist approaches 1. When all points are equidistant, 'nearest' becomes meaningless.
questions.explanationZh: 这就是维度灾难（Curse of Dimensionality）。在高维空间中，距离会趋于收敛：max_dist / min_dist 趋近于 1。当所有点都等距时，“最近”这一概念便失去了意义。

questions.question: Which distance metric is most appropriate for comparing text documents represented as TF-IDF vectors?
questions.questionZh: 在比较以 TF-IDF 向量（TF-IDF vectors）表示的文本文档时，哪种距离度量（distance metric）最为合适？
options: L2 (Euclidean) distance
L1 (Manhattan) distance
Cosine distance
Chebyshev distance
optionsZh: L2距离（L2 distance）
L1距离（Manhattan distance）
余弦距离 (Cosine distance)
切比雪夫距离 (Chebyshev distance)
questions.explanation: Cosine distance measures the angle between vectors, ignoring magnitude. For text, document length (magnitude) is noise -- direction captures meaning. Cosine consistently outperforms L1/L2 for text.
questions.explanationZh: 余弦距离（Cosine distance）用于衡量向量（vectors）之间的夹角，并忽略其模长（magnitude）。在文本处理中，文档长度（即模长）通常被视为噪声，而方向才真正捕捉了语义信息。因此，在处理文本任务时，余弦距离的表现始终优于 L1/L2 距离。

questions.question: What happens to the KNN decision boundary as K increases from 1 to N (the full dataset size)?
questions.questionZh: 当 K 从 1 增加到 N（完整数据集的大小）时，K近邻（K-Nearest Neighbors）的决策边界（decision boundary）会发生什么变化？
options: The boundary becomes more complex and detailed
The boundary stays the same regardless of K
The boundary smooths out, eventually predicting the majority class for every point
The boundary becomes circular
optionsZh: 边界 (boundary) 变得更加复杂和精细。
无论 K 值如何，决策边界 (decision boundary) 都保持不变。
决策边界 (decision boundary) 逐渐变得平滑，最终会将每个数据点都预测为多数类 (majority class)。
边界变为圆形。
questions.explanation: K=1 produces jagged boundaries that follow every point (overfitting). As K increases, boundaries smooth out. K=N means every query considers all points, always predicting the majority class (maximum bias).
questions.explanationZh: 当 K=1 时，会产生紧贴每一个数据点的锯齿状决策边界（decision boundary），从而导致过拟合（overfitting）。随着 K 值的增大，边界会逐渐变得平滑。当 K=N 时，每次查询（query）都会考虑所有数据点，模型将始终预测多数类（majority class），此时会产生最大偏差（maximum bias）。
